    All Packages

    Package Summary
    Package
    Description
    dk.tij.jissuesystem
    The root package for the JIssueSystem library.
    dk.tij.jissuesystem.api
    Contains the public API interfaces and data classes for the JIssueSystem library.
    dk.tij.jissuesystem.core
    Core functionality for issue reporting and management.
    dk.tij.jissuesystem.provider
    Contains provider types and implementations for external issue trackers.
    dk.tij.jissuesystem.provider.generic
     
    dk.tij.jissuesystem.provider.github
    GitHub-specific implementations for JIssueSystem.
    dk.tij.jissuesystem.utils
    Utility classes for JIssueSystem.
